attacking_style: Pure sprinter who finishes in fast, technical finales. Not an attacker — wins from positioning in final kilometer through lead-out trains.
team_tactics: UAE deploys high-speed lead-outs with dedicated pilots like OLIVEIRA. Tactical positioning against traffic flow (middle-right) to maximize straight-line speed. Can adapt when plan breaks down.
terrain_preference: Technical flat finales requiring precise positioning and high-speed navigation. Excels in controlled bunch sprints with organized lead-out trains available.
vulnerability: Versatility — appears exclusively suited to flat sprint stages. Limited observations suggest no climbing, breakaway, or reduced-bunch capabilities demonstrated.
key_patterns: UAE provides exceptional high-speed lead-outs through technical finales (2 observations across 2023, 2022).
Wins from middle-right positioning against traffic flow, exploiting strategic placement (2023 Vuelta Stage win).
Shows adaptability when lead-out fails, continuing to sprint when forced into early acceleration (2022 Madrid).
Consistently competitive in Vuelta sprint stages, head-to-head wins against quality sprinters like GROVES (2 observations).
form_trajectory: positive: Won stages in both 2022 and 2023 Vuelta editions, demonstrating consistent sprint capability and well-functioning UAE lead-out train
